description_long: This is a medium-to-large dog with a sturdy, athletic build and a short, smooth coat that is predominantly light tan with white markings on the chest, legs, and face. The head is broad with a pronounced stop, and the muzzle is strong and slightly tapered. The ears are floppy and hang down close to the sides of the head, while the eyes are set forward, giving an alert and friendly expression. The body is well-proportioned, with a deep chest, straight back, and muscular limbs. The tail is straight and carried level with the back, not curled or tucked. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog stands in a natural, attentive pose.
description: A sturdy, tan and white dog with a short coat, floppy ears, and a straight tail, standing alertly. The build is athletic and well-proportioned, with a friendly expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad head, floppy ears, and symmetrical white markings on the face and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's straight back, muscular limbs, and the straight tail carried level with the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dog's hindquarters, straight tail, and the even distribution of tan coloring along the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the athletic build, straight tail, and smooth coat pattern.
